report.prompt: Implement a lock-free, thread-safe asynchronous LRU cache with generic types in Python using asyncio. It should support a TTL (Time-To-Live) per item, a max size, and an asynchronous `get_or_compute` method that accepts an async factory function. The factory function must only be called once per key even if multiple coroutines request the same key concurrently before the factory returns (Thundering Herd prevention). Provide comprehensive type hinting and inline documentation. Only output raw python code.
